verificationLabel: TAB bet slip updated Friday 10 Apr 2026
summary: Round 6 is now carrying both sides of the story: the Panthers opener missed, but the Cowboys charity play landed and pushed the running charity profit out to $11.50.

scoreboard.note: The live round has already produced an upset. The original board had Panthers as the highest-confidence tip.
Dragons reshuffled with Tyrell Sloan at fullback and Clint Gutherson nursing a hamstring injury.
TAB screenshot confirms Cowboys head to head at 2.00 won, with the $5.00 stake collecting $10.00.
Brandon Smith returns for South Sydney.
Still the most volatile pick on the card.
Warriors lose Luke Metcalf to a hamstring injury; Adam Pompey was reported banned for two games.
Still reads as a pressure game rather than a confidence game.
NRL.com framed this as the match of the round.

liveAlerts.text: Cowboys beat Brisbane and the Round 6 charity bet landed at 2.00, returning $10.00 from the $5.00 stake.
The running charity profit is now $11.50 after back-to-back wins.
Panthers were beaten 32-16 by the Bulldogs on Thursday 9 April 2026, so the top-confidence tip is already down.
Adam Reynolds was named despite a groin complaint and was described by NRL.com as needing to prove fitness.
Clint Gutherson was listed as nursing a hamstring injury for the Dragons update.
Brandon Smith returns for the Rabbitohs.
Warriors lost Luke Metcalf to a hamstring injury; team-list update also noted Adam Pompey's ban.
